text: - 8.1 TURNKEY SCOPE: The intent of this Subcontract is that the work performed by the Subcontractor be completed in every respect. The descriptions of the work included in this Subcontract are clarifications of specific items and are not intended to limit the scope of work required or reasonably inferable for complete systems per the Subcontract Documents or scope of work. It is understood and accepted by the Subcontractor that completion and refinement of the Subcontract Documents will occur as the Project evolves. No adjustments in the Contract Sum shall be made and no adjustment in the scheduled completion date shall be made for work that can be inferred or anticipated from the Subcontract Documents. Conflicts between Subcontract Documents that are not specifically addressed in the Subcontract will be performed in accordance with the final resolution of the Subcontract Documents as determined by the Design Consultant and Owner. Any cost or schedule impact to be mutually agreed upon by Subcontractor and Contractor.
